headline: Baker Hughes, Halliburton, and Transocean Are All Up 5% — Here’s the Story Behind Each Stock’s Move
summary: Baker Hughes (NASDAQ:BKR), Halliburton (NYSE:HAL), and Transocean (NYSE:RIG) are all trading 4% to 5% higher Tuesday as crude oil’s continued strength lifts the entire oilfield services complex. The sector is catching a tailwind from a WTI crude oil market that has staged one of its most dramatic rallies in recent memory. The catalyst is hard ...
